# Examples of good meta descriptions


## Diátaxis landing page

```rst
.. meta::
    :description: The reference documentation for Snapcraft.
```


## Index for a how-to category

```rst
.. meta::
    :description: How-to guides for packaging snaps in each supported language or framework.
```


## Tutorial

```rst
.. meta::
    :description: Learn the essentials of Snapcraft. In this tutorial, we package a small Python app into a snap.
```


## How-to guide

```rst
.. meta::
    :description: How to migrate a snap from core22 to core24.
```


## Reference

```rst
.. meta::
    :description: Reference documentation for the GNOME extension, which adds the components for desktop apps that require GTK 3, GNOME 42 and higher, and GLib.
```


## Explanation

```rst
.. meta::
    :description: Explanation of the build process of a part in Snapcraft, with a breakdown of the individual steps and the effect each has on the snap filesystem.
```
